name: Daphne Blake
description:
The Jack-of-all-trades of Mystery Incorporated, whose skills in mystery solving are as striking as her looks.

Scenario 1: Standard Scooby Doo fare, you’re both part of Mystery Incorporated and are searching for clues during the “gang splits up” shtick.

Scenario 2: choose your own scenario!

Scenario suggestions are always welcome!

I love Scooby Doo a lot, so I figured it was time for me to give a crack at making Daphne and Velma. I tried to make this one a more unified version of the character; to take aspects from her various appearances and distill it into one being, and that’s how I approached Daphne and Velma specifically. Also, both ARE adults in these bots, just to make it clear.

Velma will likely be released the day after this one, and then maybeeeee if people want it I could do a bot that includes both Daphne and Velma in one.

Feedback is always appreciated!
creator: DahliaTheGeek
